title: Inexorable (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Inexorable''''' was the name of several [[Capital ship/Legends|capital]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]:

*'''''[[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|Inexorable]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Inexorable (Victory-class)|Inexorable]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Inexorable (Neutron Star-class)|Inexorable]]''''', a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]]

{{Disambig}}
